new_terms.context: A key feature in Rubin's Transformer Engine to boost inference performance by dynamic computation of sparsity.
Default power profiles for Rubin GPUs representing maximum performance and maximum efficiency respectively.
A mechanical component added to the Rubin package structure to provide support and avoid warpage.
Thermal interface material used between the heat spreader lid and the cold plate.
NVIDIA's custom ARM CPU design used in the Vera CPU.
Refers to a chip die that reaches the maximum size limit of the lithography equipment.
A version of the Spectrum-6 switch utilizing Co-Packaged Optics for larger scale-out clusters.
